items.title_en: Earnings poised to stoke confidence in a stock market that has rebounded to all-time highs. Here's what's ahead
items.title_zh: 盈利有望激发人们对已反弹至历史高点的股市的信心。这是接下来的事情
items.desc_en: The fast-moving developments on the warfront add to confidence in many parts of the Street that the bottom is in for equities.
items.desc_zh: 战争前线的快速发展增强了华尔街许多人士对股市触底的信心。

items.title_en: S&P 500 notches first close above 7,100, Nasdaq posts longest win streak since 1992: Live updates
items.title_zh: 标准普尔 500 指数首次收于 7,100 点上方，纳斯达克指数创下 1992 年以来最长连胜纪录：实时更新
items.desc_en: U.S. stocks rose on Friday after Iran declared the Strait of Hormuz "completely open" on the heels of a ceasefire announcement between Israel and Lebanon.

items.title_en: These stocks reporting next week are seeing their earnings momentum rise

items.desc_en: Stocks reporting earnings next week that are also seeing accelerating earnings momentum include Vertiv and Amazon.
items.desc_zh: 下周公布财报且盈利势头加速的股票包括维谛技术 (Vertiv) 和亚马逊 (Amazon)。

items.title_en: Perspective: AI demand is inflated, and only Anthropic is being realistic
items.title_zh: 观点：人工智能需求膨胀，只有 Anthropic 是现实的
items.desc_en: The main usage metric for artificial intelligence, called tokens, looks explosive on paper, but it may be significantly overstated.

items.title_en: Fed Governor Waller says Iran war and labor market risks are keeping central bank on hold
items.title_zh: 美联储理事沃勒表示伊朗战争和劳动力市场风险使央行按兵不动
items.desc_en: Federal Reserve Governor Christopher Waller on Friday said current economic conditions are complicating the approach to interest rates.
items.desc_zh: 美联储理事克里斯托弗·沃勒周五表示，当前的经济状况使利率方法变得复杂化。

items.title_en: Average tax refund is 11.2% higher, latest IRS filing data shows
items.title_zh: 最新 IRS 备案数据显示，平均退税额高出 11.2%
items.desc_en: The average tax refund is 11.2% higher this season, according to the latest IRS filing data. Here's what taxpayers need to know.
items.desc_zh: 根据最新的国税局备案数据，本季平均退税额高出 11.2%。以下是纳税人需要了解的内容。

items.title_en: Japan reveals new name for 40C-and-hotter days after blistering summer
items.title_zh: 日本公布了酷暑过后 40 摄氏度及更热天气的新名称
items.desc_en: The term - kokushobi - translates to "cruelly hot", "brutally hot" or "severely hot", and comes after Japan's hottest summer on record.
items.desc_zh: “kokushobi”这个词的意思是“酷热”、“酷热”或“酷热”，是在日本有记录以来最热的夏季之后出现的。

items.title_en: Kanye West concert in Poland cancelled over antisemitic comments
items.title_zh: 坎耶·韦斯特 (Kanye West) 波兰演唱会因反犹太主义言论被取消
items.desc_en: The UK government blocked the rapper from entering the country over his history of making pro-Nazi and racist statements.
items.desc_zh: 英国政府因这位说唱歌手曾发表亲纳粹和种族主义言论而禁止他入境。

items.title_en: AI chipmaker Cerebras set to file for IPO as soon as today
items.title_zh: AI 芯片制造商 Cerebras 将于今天申请 IPO
items.desc_en: Through the public offering, Cerebras could be worth three times more than what it was in a 2025 funding round, one person said.
items.desc_zh: 一位知情人士表示，通过此次公开发行，Cerebras 的估值可能是 2025 年一轮融资的三倍。

items.title_en: Bessent says to adjust your paycheck withholding — but mistakes could trigger a tax bill, experts caution
items.title_zh: 贝森特表示要调整你的工资预扣税——但专家警告说，错误可能会引发税单
items.desc_en: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent told workers to update their paycheck withholding. But mistakes could trigger a tax bill next season.

items.title_en: Ceasefire with Israel brings respite to Lebanon, but obstacles to peace remain
items.title_zh: 与以色列的停火给黎巴嫩带来了喘息之机，但和平的障碍仍然存在
items.desc_en: The halt to weeks of fighting is being celebrated in Lebanon, but it will be difficult to ensure it lasts.
items.desc_zh: 黎巴嫩正在庆祝战斗已停止数周，但很难确保这种情况持续下去。

items.title_en: Oil prices plunge as Iran says Strait 'open'
items.title_zh: 伊朗称海峡“开放”，油价暴跌
items.desc_en: Brent crude sinks 10% after Iran says the key waterway is completely open for commercial ships for the rest of the ceasefire.
items.desc_zh: 伊朗表示，在停火协议剩余时间内，主要水道对商船完全开放，布伦特原油价格下跌 10%。

items.title_zh: AMD、甲骨文、微软和 IGV 领涨科技股本周表现
items.desc_en: Oracle, AMD and Microsoft are on pace for historic weeks, while Intel, Broadcom, Micron, Marvell and ON Semiconductor are all roaring in April.
items.desc_zh: 甲骨文、AMD 和微软在历史性的几周内保持着良好的发展势头，而英特尔、博通、美光、Marvell 和安森美半导体则在 4 月份表现强劲。

items.title_en: Singer D4vd arrested in connection with death of missing teen girl
items.title_zh: 歌手 D4vd 因涉嫌失踪少女死亡而被捕

items.desc_zh: 这次搜寻过程一波三折，牵动着韩国的心，甚至还引发了一种迷因币的诞生。

items.desc_zh: 由于他们的足球队在比赛中没有唱国歌，两人寻求庇护。

items.desc_zh: 这名德克萨斯州男子还面临联邦重罪指控，据称他持有鼓吹对人工智能高管实施暴力的文件。

items.title_en: Roblox defends expanded age‑checks after parents raise concerns over errors
items.title_zh: 在家长对错误表示担忧后，Roblox 为扩大年龄检查辩护
items.desc_en: With 144m daily users, the gaming company is extending its tech to introduce two age‑specific accounts.
items.desc_zh: 该游戏公司拥有 1.44 亿每日用户，正在扩展其技术，推出两个特定年龄的帐户。

items.desc_zh: 此次事件标志着这家游戏巨头第二次遭到年轻的英语黑客的攻击。
